name: @gana-v8/research-worker
description: Executes deterministic research tasks, optional AI synthesis, and freezes feature snapshots for scoring.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @gana-v8/domain-core build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/model-registry build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/ai-runtime build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/research-engine build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/feature-store build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @gana-v8/domain-core build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/model-registry build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/ai-runtime build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/research-engine build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/feature-store build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --noEmit
scripts.clean: node --eval "import('node:fs/promises').then(fs => fs.rm('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
